---
title: "Claude Code"
description: "Build a template with Claude Code preinstalled."
---

# Claude Code

This page shows how to build a template with the Claude Code CLI preinstalled.

For day-to-day usage inside a sandbox, see [Agents: Claude Code](/docs/agents/claude-code).

## Template definition

```go
package main

import e2b "github.com/superduck-ai/e2b-go-sdk"

var template = e2b.Template(nil).
	FromNodeImage("24").
	AptInstall([]string{"curl", "git", "ripgrep"}, nil).
	RunCmd("npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code@latest", &struct{ User string }{User: "root"})
```

## Build

```go
package main

import (
	"context"
	"log"

	e2b "github.com/superduck-ai/e2b-go-sdk"
)

func main() {
	buildInfo, err := e2b.Build(context.Background(), template, "claude-code", &e2b.BuildOptions{
		BasicBuildOptions: e2b.BasicBuildOptions{
			CpuCount:    1,
			MemoryMB:    1024,
			OnBuildLogs: e2b.DefaultBuildLogger(),
		},
	})
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}

	log.Println(buildInfo.TemplateID)
}
```

## Create a sandbox and run Claude Code

```go
package main

import (
	"context"
	"log"
	"os"

	e2b "github.com/superduck-ai/e2b-go-sdk"
)

func main() {
	ctx := context.Background()
	timeoutMs := 0

	sandbox, err := e2b.Create(ctx, "claude-code", &e2b.SandboxOpts{
		Envs: map[string]string{
			"ANTHROPIC_API_KEY": os.Getenv("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY"),
		},
	})
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}
	defer sandbox.Kill(context.Background(), nil)

	execution, err := sandbox.Commands.Run(
		ctx,
		`claude --dangerously-skip-permissions -p "Create a hello world index.html"`,
		&e2b.CommandStartOpts{TimeoutMs: &timeoutMs},
	)
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}

	log.Println(execution.(*e2b.CommandResult).Stdout)
}
```
